parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional but strongly recommended on every write. May be any client-chosen opaque string (max 255 characters); a new unique value per logical operation is recommended, reused when retrying that operation. UUIDs are a good default but any unique identifier within your namespace works. The server stores the key + request hash + response for 24 hours. Same key + same payload returns the cached response with no second write. Same key + different payload returns `409 Conflict`.
